evidence: index.ts: _decode moved inside try (line 46), r declared with let before try (line 44), finally uses r?.free() null-guard (line 52), catch wraps in JpegDecodeError. TypeError-masking failure mode gone.

No runtime assertion data.length === width * height * 4 added inside decodeJpegScaled before the return (line 47). The test in T05 covers this invariant but the source-level guard the task asked for is absent.
JpegDecodeError class present at lines 31-40 with code='decode_failed' and cause fields. Wired into catch at lines 48-51. Callers can now instanceof-check JpegDecodeError vs other errors.
lib.rs lines 68-72: DecodeResult now uses decoded.width/decoded.height (post-decode info) not the pre-decode out_w/out_h. Dimension/buffer mismatch failure mode addressed.

test/index.test.ts exists with 5 contract tests: field presence, buffer length invariant, invariant across denoms, JpegDecodeError thrown for bad input (with code+cause checks), and buffer durability after free.
Plan marked adr_draft/deferred. No CI audit step added; no fix expected.
